name: Climate.Haier → Set Horizontal Airflow
description: (supported only by hOn) Set direction for horizontal airflow if the horizontal swing is disabled.

config_entries.label: Horizontal Airflow
config_entries.description: The horizontal airflow direction. Possible values: `Max_Left`, `Left`, `Center`, `Right`, `Max_Right`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the Haier climate component.
